title: ruscus × microglossus
intro: Ruscus × microglossus, also known as Butcher's Broom, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating conditions such as varicose veins, hemorrhoids, and urinary incontinence. The health benefits of Ruscus × microglossus include improving circulation, reducing swelling, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
